name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 88 closed: Genius/verification wave implemented against the S87 CI failures. nextMilestone: Recover Lighthouse CI from real local-preview scores: homepage performance 0.56 vs 0.85 and homepage SEO 0.93 vs 0.95.
